latest_scope: Three strict v2 persisted briefs updated and run with separate executor subagents in isolated scenarios.

large-file.notes: Strict v2 conversion passed. Large one-file guide became a frontmatter-backed explicit tree with markdown-link Source lines, preserved critical refund text, and left draft-notes.md outside the graph.

Updated already-split-structure, invalid-split-structure, and large-file persisted briefs plus setup scripts for strict v2 coverage.
